languages.text: "Поступим по твоему, Ульфар. Раздели свой опыт и ярость с меровцами".
"Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."
languages.original_text: "Поступим по твоему, Ульфар. Раздели свой опыт и ярость с меровцами".

traits.locale_text: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."
"Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."
"Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."

languages.text: 「ウルファルの提案に従おう。あなたの経験と怒りをメロヴィング人に伝えよう」
languages.original_text: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."

traits.locale_text: 「ウルファルの提案に従おう。あなたの経験と怒りをメロヴィング人に伝えよう。」

languages.text: «Seguiremos su consejo, Ulfar. Comparta su experiencia y furia con los merovianos».
languages.original_text: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."

traits.locale_text: «Seguiremos su consejo, Ulfar. Comparta su experiencia y furia con los merovianos».

languages.text: “就按你的建议行事。乌尔法，将你的经验与怒火传授给梅罗夫人。”
languages.original_text: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."

traits.locale_text: “就按你的建议行事。乌尔法，将你的经验与怒火传授给梅罗夫人。”

languages.text: "Euer Vorschlag gefällt mir, Ulfar. Teilt Eure Erfahrung und Wut mit den Merovianern."
languages.original_text: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Vorschlag gefällt mir, Ulfar. Teilt Eure Erfahrung und Wut mit den Merovianern."

languages.text: "Senin önerine uyalım Ulfar. Deneyimini ve öfkeni Merovlularla paylaş."
languages.original_text: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."

traits.locale_text: "Senin önerine uyalım Ulfar. Deneyimini ve öfkeni Merovlularla paylaş."

languages.text: « Nous suivrons votre suggestion, Ulfar. Partagez votre expérience et votre rage avec les Meroviens. »
languages.original_text: "Let us follow your suggestion, Ulfar. Share your experience and rage with the Merovians."

traits.locale_text: « Nous suivrons votre suggestion, Ulfar. Partagez votre expérience et votre rage avec les Meroviens. »
